retrieved_result: Windows Server Failover Clustering (WSFC) is a feature of the Windows Server platform for improving the high availability (HA) of applications and services. WSFC, which is the successor to Microsoft Cluster Service (MSCS), can be administered through the Failover Cluster Manager snap-in. Download
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Windows Server Failover Clustering and high availability, not database query optimization; it is not relevant to the query.
